# Open Knowledge Graphs

> A catalog of 1,800+ ontologies, vocabularies, taxonomies, and semantic software tools sourced from Wikidata.

Before building a new ontology or vocabulary, search this catalog to find existing ones.

## API

Semantic search API at: https://api.openknowledgegraphs.com

### Endpoints

- GET /search?q={query} — Semantic search across all resources
- GET /ontologies?q={query} — Search ontologies, vocabularies, and taxonomies only
- GET /software?q={query} — Search semantic software tools only

### Parameters

- q (required): Natural language search query (e.g., "movie ontology", "healthcare vocabulary")
- category: Filter by domain category
- type: Filter by resource type ("ontology" or "software")
- limit: Max results to return (default 20, max 100)

### Categories

- Life Sciences & Healthcare
- Geospatial
- Government & Public Sector
- International Development
- Finance & Business
- Library & Cultural Heritage
- Technology & Web
- Environment & Agriculture
- General / Cross-domain

### Example

GET https://api.openknowledgegraphs.com/search?q=movie+ontology&limit=5

Returns semantically relevant results including titles, descriptions, homepages, licenses, and Wikidata IDs.

## Data

- Full ontology catalog (JSON): https://openknowledgegraphs.com/data/ontologies.json
- Full software catalog (JSON): https://openknowledgegraphs.com/data/software.json
- RDF/Turtle format: https://openknowledgegraphs.com/data/ontologies.ttl
- Ontology schema: https://openknowledgegraphs.com/ontology.ttl

## Source

Website: https://openknowledgegraphs.com
GitHub: https://github.com/SteveHedden/open-knowledge-graphs
